vol_description:
This volumen contains data collected with the two versions of the Speech-to-Speech Synchronization Test (Explicit Accelerated and Implicit Fixed versions) in two different modalities: in the lab or remotely. Data has been collected with unrestricted participation requirements other than being between 18 and 50 years old and native American speaker.

Files are distributed in folders as follows:
Explicit accelerated in lab (ENG_ExpAcc_InLab; N= 115), explicit accelerated online (ENG_ExpAcc_Online; N= 77),  the implicit fixed in lab (ENG_ImpFix_InLab, N=129), and the implicit fixed online (ENG_ImpFix_Online N=144). 

For most participants, two audio files are included, except when for technical reasons one of the audio files could not be retrieved.
